messages.content: Can you explain how React Server Components work and when they render on the server vs the client?
React Server Components render on the server and send a serialized tree to the client, so they never ship their JS to the browser. Client Components opt in with 'use client'.
How do I create a responsive layout with CSS Grid using grid-template-areas?
Define named areas with grid-template-areas and remap them inside media queries to rearrange the layout per breakpoint.
I'm confused about TypeScript generics and constraints. How do I use extends in a generic?
A constraint like <T extends { id: string }> restricts the type argument so you can safely access .id inside the generic function.
What's the recommended way to set up a store with Redux Toolkit and createSlice?
Use configureStore with your slice reducers; createSlice generates the actions and reducer for each slice automatically.
How do Node.js streams and backpressure work when piping a readable to a writable?
pipe() handles backpressure for you by pausing the readable when the writable's buffer is full and resuming when it drains.
What are the Core Web Vitals and how do I improve Largest Contentful Paint?
LCP, CLS and INP are the Core Web Vitals. Improve LCP by preloading the hero image, trimming render-blocking CSS, and using a fast server response.
Explain the difference between git merge and git rebase and when I should use each.
Merge preserves history with a merge commit; rebase replays your commits onto the target for a linear history. Rebase local work, merge shared branches.
Hi! How can I help you with your Frontend Masters learning today?
